intro.headline: We Believe Every Driver Deserves Dignity, Recognition, and a Professional Identity.

story.headlineHtml: A Bridge of Work. A Bridge of Dignity.
story.vision: An India where every driver is a certified, dignified and trusted.
story.mission: To deploy India's first national soft skills and upskilling framework.
story.descriptionHtml: KaramSetu is a bridge — between where India's drivers are today and where they deserve to be. Between informal labour and certified professionalism. Between low recognition and earned respect. Between a system that only measures complaints and one that actively builds capability.

items.title: Dignity of Labour
items.desc: Every certified driver is more respected — by passengers

items.title: Systemic Change
items.desc: Professionalism as a continuous, measurable, and renewable standard.

items.title: Inclusion by Design
items.desc: Built for India's real workforce — any literacy level, any phone.

items.title: Trust as Infrastructure
items.desc: Built through training, certification, and consistent standards.

roadmap.description: KaramSetu will be rolled out in six structured phases — beginning with a pilot in 2–3 major cities and scaling to a nationwide certification standard by Year 5.

phases.title: Phase 3
phases.desc: Private and household driver segment, Tier-2 cities

roadmap.goal: 9 Lakh+ certified drivers. One national standard. A transformed mobility workforce.

team.headlineHtml: Built by People Who Believe in the Work.

partners.description: KaramSetu partners with aggregators, government bodies, and CSR organisations to build a structured and scalable driver certification ecosystem.

cta.headlineHtml: The Road to a Certified India Starts Here.
cta.description: Whether you are a driver ready to build your professional identity, a government body exploring systemic change, or a company looking to invest in meaningful impact — KaramSetu has a place for you.
